mapper.select: SELECT CAST(json_value AS CHAR) FROM site_config WHERE config_key = 'site.statistics.override' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_config (config_key, json_value, data_type, is_public, description) VALUES ('site.statistics.override', CAST(#{overrideJson} AS JSON), 'JSON', 0, '站点统计展示调整值') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE json_value = CAST(#{overrideJson} AS JSON), data_type = 'JSON', is_public = 0, description = '站点统计展示调整值'
